item.title:
Lots of developer tools are having a missed opportunity
Their product is now essentially useful to...
item.description:
Lots of developer tools are having a missed opportunity
Their product is now essentially useful to anyone who has access to an agent, not just professional developers. But their messaging & marketing is still speaking to developers and is intimidating & unintelligible to normal people
--- @zarazhangrui | ❤️ 7 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 436
item.author: @zarazhangrui

Me and codex were busy.

Upgrading the 🦞 OpenClaw army.
--- @steipete | ❤️ 99 | 🔁 3 | 💬 16 | 👁 4553
